system.subtitle: 企业商业版图与供应链递归探索系统

implemented_scope: scripts/load_operator_source_captures.py reads the official NVIDIA anchor registry and an operator-provided capture fixture.

The loader validates source URL agreement, operator identity fields, capture timestamp, approval_scope, operator signature, source_text_sha256 and required usage attestations before writing database rows.

Operator capture raw_source_snapshots preserve source text, source hash, parser version, record_mode=operator_source_capture, source_health, operator provenance, operator_supplied_capture=true, live_retrieval=false, release_clearance=false and relationship_publication=false.
Operator capture source_documents use a distinct external_id suffix and raw_storage_uri under tests/fixtures/operator_source_captures/.
Operator capture entity_resolution_candidates are stored under parser_version nvidia-operator-source-capture-v1 with operator_verified review_status.
Operator capture ingestion_evidence_chain rows are context-only and explicitly mark operator_capture_context_only_not_published_relationship.

The integration test runs the loader twice to prove idempotent upsert behavior and asserts 2 raw snapshots, 2 evidence rows, 30 resolution candidates, 2 NVIDIA subject candidates, 2 TSMC candidates and zero relationship_fact_candidates for the operator parser.
validation_commands: GitHub Actions make verify-g2-db must prove the operator capture contract inside PostgreSQL integration because this host has no local Docker/PostgreSQL.
remaining_gaps_before_done: This is an operator capture contract and deterministic fixture, not live official-source retrieval.
The fixture proves provenance and parser gates; it is not legal clearance or market/brand clearance.
A real operator-supplied owner decision or a second independent-source closure path is still required before any Golden Vertical fact can be release-approved.
No relationship_fact_candidates or production relationships are published by this loader.
rollback: Run scripts/migrate.py downgrade --steps 1 or remove infra/db/migrations/0011_operator_source_capture_constraints when rolling back before deployment.
Remove the operator capture invocation and assertions from tests/integration/test_database_migrations.py.
Remove the operator evidence paths from Makefile lint and scripts/validate_v5_production_readiness_sync.py.
